---
title: "SMR summary"
author: "Darren Cameron"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
params:
  cell_types: null
  in_dir: null
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(stringr)

# Set variables from params
cell_types <- params$cell_types
in_dir <- params$in_dir

# Function to read and summarize SMR results
summarize_smr <- function(cell_type, in_dir) {
  file_path <- file.path(in_dir, cell_type, paste0(cell_type, "_scz.smr"))
  message('file_path: ', file_path)
  if (file.exists(file_path)) {
    smr <- read_tsv(file_path)
    n_probes <- nrow(smr)
    smr_sig <- smr |> filter(p_SMR < (0.05 / n_probes))
    smr_sig_heidi <- smr_sig |> filter(p_HEIDI > 0.05 | !is.na(p_HEIDI))
    return(data.frame(
      Cell_Type = cell_type,
      Total_Probes = n_probes,
      Significant_SMR = nrow(smr_sig),
      Significant_SMR_HEIDI = nrow(smr_sig_heidi)
    ))
  } else {
    message("File not found for cell type: ", cell_type)
    return(data.frame(
      Cell_Type = cell_type,
      Total_Probes = 0,
      Significant_SMR = 0,
      Significant_SMR_HEIDI = 0
    ))
  }
}

# Function to read and summarize SMR results
extract_smr_log_params <- function(log_dir, cell_types) {
  # Initialize parameters to extract
  params <- c(
    "GWAS SNPs Included",
    "eQTL SNPs Included",
    "Individuals in LD Reference",
    "SNPs After Allele Check",
    "SNPs Excluded for Frequency",
    "Probes Analyzed"
  )
  
  # Initialize result data frame
  result <- data.frame(Parameter = params, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  
  # Process each cell type
  for (cell_type in cell_types) {
    log_file <- file.path(log_dir, paste0("smr_", cell_type, "_scz.log"))
    message("Processing log file: ", log_file)
    
    # Initialize default values
    values <- rep("Unknown", length(params))
    
    if (file.exists(log_file)) {
      log_content <- read_lines(log_file)
      
      # Extract parameters using regular expressions
      # GWAS SNPs Included
      gwas_snps <- str_extract(log_content, "GWAS summary data of (\\d+) SNPs to be included")
      gwas_snps <- gwas_snps[!is.na(gwas_snps)]
      if (length(gwas_snps) > 0) {
        values[1] <- str_extract(gwas_snps[1], "\\d+")
      }
      
      # eQTL SNPs Included
      eqtl_snps <- str_extract(log_content, "(\\d+) SNPs to be included from \\[.*\\.esi\\]")
      eqtl_snps <- eqtl_snps[!is.na(eqtl_snps)]
      if (length(eqtl_snps) > 0) {
        values[2] <- str_extract(eqtl_snps[1], "\\d+")
      }
      
      # Individuals in LD Reference
      individuals <- str_extract(log_content, "(\\d+) individuals to be included from \\[.*\\.fam\\]")
      individuals <- individuals[!is.na(individuals)]
      if (length(individuals) > 0) {
        values[3] <- str_extract(individuals[1], "\\d+")
      }
      
      # SNPs After Allele Check
      allele_check <- str_extract(log_content, "(\\d+) SNPs are included after allele checking")
      allele_check <- allele_check[!is.na(allele_check)]
      if (length(allele_check) > 0) {
        values[4] <- str_extract(allele_check[1], "\\d+")
      }
      
      # SNPs Excluded for Frequency
      freq_excluded <- str_extract(log_content, "(\\d+) SNPs.*with allele frequency differences > 0.20")
      freq_excluded <- freq_excluded[!is.na(freq_excluded)]
      if (length(freq_excluded) > 0) {
        values[5] <- str_extract(freq_excluded[1], "\\d+")
      }
      
      # Probes Analyzed
      probes <- str_extract(log_content, "SMR analysis \\(SMR and HEIDI tests\\) for (\\d+) probes")
      probes <- probes[!is.na(probes)]
      if (length(probes) > 0) {
        values[6] <- str_extract(probes[1], "\\d+")
      }
      
    } else {
      message("Log file not found for cell type: ", cell_type)
    }
    
    # Add values to result data frame
    result[[cell_type]] <- values
  }
  
  return(result)
}
```

### SMR results

```{r plot_tables, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
summary_data <- bind_rows(lapply(cell_types, summarize_smr, in_dir))

# Format and display summary table
kable(summary_data,
      caption = "Summary of SMR and HEIDI Results by Cell Type",
      col.names = c("Cell Type", "Total Probes", "Significant SMR", "Significant SMR + HEIDI"),
      align = "lrrr",
      format = "html") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"))
```

***

### SMR logs

```{r logs}
# Example execution (comment out if used in Snakemake)
log_dir <- "../../results/00LOG/07SMR"
cell_types <- c("ExN-1", "ExN-2", "InN", "OPC", "RG", "Endo-Peri", "MG")
extract_smr_log_params(log_dir, cell_types)
```

### Tables tabbed {.tabset}

```{r plot_tabbed, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
for (cell_type in cell_types) {
  cat(" \n#### ", cell_type, "\n", sep = "")
  summary_data <- summarize_smr(cell_type, in_dir)
  cat(' \n')
}

```
